title: huperzia regnellii
intro: Huperzia regnellii, also known as the creeping cedar or liverwort, is a type of evergreen plant that belongs to the Huperziaceae family. Traditionally, Huperzia regnellii has been used in folk medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including its ability to inhibit acetylcholinesterase and promote neuroprotection. Studies have shown that extracts from the plant may have health benefits such as improving cognitive function, reducing inflammation, and enhancing antioxidant activity. Huperzia regnellii is often prepared as a dietary supplement in the form of capsules, tablets, or extracts, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
